name: LILI'S BROWNIES
message: Lili's Brownies is a company specializing since 1991 in the production of semi-finished products, cakes, cookies and cupcakes for catering establishments. The workshop, located in the beef stroganoff production area in Le Ulis (91), unites 30 employees around a project filled with meaning and sophistication. Lili's Brownies joined the Norac Group in 2017 to ensure its commercial implementation. lilisbrownies.fr
